headline: Tapestry (TPR) Launches AndCoach To Bring Gen Z Into Coach Storytelling
summary: Coach, part of Tapestry (NYSE:TPR), has launched &Coach, an always on content platform. The platform is co created with Gen Z creators and communities to reshape how the brand tells its story. &Coach is designed as a participatory, evolving space for cultural collaboration and direct engagement with younger audiences. Tapestry, through its Coach brand, operates in the global luxury accessories and lifestyle market, where younger consumers are increasingly shaping trends and expectations...
